content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Students will be able to learn about the numerous security standards established by the worldwide sector. The different types of security applications utilized in industry.
Contenu de la matière
Internet Protocol Suite (IP, ARP, TCP, DHCP, DNS, HTTP)
Security at Network Layer (IPSec)
Security at Transport Layer (SSL/TLS)
Security at Application Layer (PGP, S/MIME)
VPN
Firewalls
Intrusion Detection
Wireless Network Security
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen
Références
Network Security and Cryptography: Bernard Menezes, CENGAGE Learning.
Network Security - Private Communication in a Public World by CharlienKaufman, Radia
Perlman and Mike Speciner, Pearson/PHI.
